_comment: Copy an API-format ComfyUI workflow to config/comfy-upscale-workflow.json, or set PVU_COMFY_WORKFLOW_PATH to your workflow JSON. The adapter patches LoadImage/image inputs with the uploaded source image and numeric scale/upscale_by/factor inputs with the selected scale.

example.replace_this_file: Export a real workflow from ComfyUI with Dev mode > Save (API Format).
